calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-11-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for short cause trial/Prove Up Hearing. Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Daniel Marc Bornstein, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff William C. Parenti, Trustee of the William C. and Annabel A. Parenti Trust, UTD 10/14/1993.
Witness, William C. Parenti, sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant Karen Monina.

Plaintiff's Exhibits:
1-Grant Deed, Doc 2003-H454595-00 dated 6/5/2003
2-Letter from Bornstein to Monina dated 5/23/2016
3-Declaration of service of notice signed by Colleen Golder 5/24/2016
Court returned all exhibits to Plaintiff.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Rental Agreement is canceled. The lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 733 Laguna Honda Boulevard, SF CA

Damages $0.00
Holdover damages $0.00
Pre-judgment interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $0.00
for a Total Judgment of $0.00, Possession Only

Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jul-11-2016 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-07-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: JPT: Ora Prochovnick; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff William Parenti is present.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein for the plaintiff.
Defendant Karen Monina ARRIVED LATE AT 2:06 pm.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar. The JPT released the plaintiff and plaintiff's counsel at 2:00. The defendant arrived at 2:06pm. The trial date of JUL-11-2016 remains on calendar. (501)
